channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TWS Focuses on Growth and Authenticity Beyond Viral Fame
item.description: The article highlights the rising K-pop group TWS and their efforts to move beyond the initial wave of viral success that brought them into the spotlight. While their popularity has been boosted by on...

item.title: Cardoso criticises pitch conditions after Sundowns’ goalless draw with Richards Bay
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso expressed his frustration following a scoreless draw against Richards Bay at the Richards Bay Stadium, highlighting the impact of the dry pitch on the game. Sund...

item.title: California Man Accused of Targeting Trump at Press Dinner to Face Court
item.description: A man from California is set to appear in court after being accused of opening fire at a gala dinner attended by former President Donald Trump. The incident took place at the Washington Hilton hotel d...

item.title: South Africans Urge Shop Owners to Prioritise Local Workers Amid High Unemployment
item.description: Tension don dey rise for South Africa as locals dey push foreign shop owners make dem give priority to South African workers instead of other Africans. One viral video show black South Africans confro...

item.title: Human Eyes Evolved from a Single Median Eye of a 600-Million-Year-Old Ancestor
item.description: Recent research from Lund University and the University of Sussex reveals that all vertebrates, including humans, can trace their vision back to a single, light-sensitive 'median eye' from a worm-like...

item.title: Challenges of accessing free maternal and child healthcare in rural Tanzania
item.description: In rural Tanzania, many mothers still face financial barriers despite government directives providing free maternal and child healthcare. In villages like Iwemba, mothers such as Furaha and Mariam rep...

item.title: Major wildfires in Georgia expand rapidly amid dry conditions and strong winds
item.description: Two major wildfires in southeastern Georgia continue to expand, with authorities warning that conditions could worsen due to wind and dry weather. The largest blaze, known as the Highway 82 Fire, bega...

item.title: Farmer Resists Relocation Amid Green Belt Housing Development
item.description: Alan French, a 76-year-old farmer, has refused to vacate his home next to a planned new village in Godley, near Hyde, Tameside, where 2,150 houses are set to be built on green belt land. French, who h...

item.title: Obama Comments on Unclear Motive Behind Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: Former President Barack Obama expressed uncertainty about the motives behind a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, even as the suspect, Cole Allen, allegedly prepared a manife...

item.title: Manitoba to Introduce Ban on Social Media and AI for Youth to Protect Attention Spans
item.description: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew has announced plans to implement a ban on social media and artificial intelligence chatbots for youth. Kinew believes that these technologies are increasingly being used to ...

item.title: Three pedestrians, including an infant, hospitalized after vehicle collision in North York
item.description: Three pedestrians, including an infant and two adults, were taken to hospital after being struck by a vehicle in Toronto’s North York area on April 26, 2026. Emergency crews responded to the scene in ...

item.title: Trump criticises reporter for reading shooter's manifesto during interview
item.description: Donald Trump criticised CBS News anchor Norah O'Donnell for reading excerpts from a manifesto authored by Cole Thomas Allen, who attempted an attack during the White House Correspondents' Dinner. In a...

item.title: Acting Attorney General Urges Congress to Restore DHS Funding After White House Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting
item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche said the shooting that occurred during the 2026 White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner should push Congress to resolve its ongoing funding dispute ove...

item.title: NYSC Corps member killed in crossfire during Abuja robbery response
item.description: Na early morning on 25th April 2026 for Dei-Dei, Abuja, one serving National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) member, Abdulsamad Jamiu, tragically lose him life during crossfire wey happen between soldiers ...

item.title: Suspect's Anti-Trump Sentiment Investigated in White House Press Dinner Shooting
item.description: Investigators are probing anti-Trump sentiment as a potential motive behind the shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump and senior members of his administratio...

item.title: TSC Seeks Applications for Two New Member Positions
item.description: The Teachers Service Commission (TSC) has announced two open positions for members, inviting Kenyans to apply for these critical roles. Candidates must be Kenyan citizens with a degree from a recognis...

item.title: Consumer Reports Names 2026 Subaru Crosstrek Top Subcompact SUV Amid Classification Debate
item.description: The 2026 Subaru Crosstrek has been named Consumer Reports’ top pick in the subcompact SUV category, praised for its comfortable ride, practical size, and strong all-wheel-drive capability. Starting at...

item.title: APC Condemns Makinde Over ‘Operation Wetie’ Comment, Raises Security Concerns
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don strongly criticise Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, over one statement wey him make during an opposition summit for Ibadan, where him reference “Operation Weti...

item.title: Analysis of the Strategic Consequences of Trump’s Actions Toward Iran
item.description: The article outlines ten key points regarding former President Donald Trump's decision to engage militarily with Iran. It emphasizes that Israel played a significant role in urging the U.S. into confl...

item.title: Social Media Sparks Debate Over Tinubu and Atiku Sleeping at Public Events
item.description: For Naija, social media don burst with tori after images show President Bola Tinubu dey appear to doze during official events, na response to criticism wey former Vice President Atiku Abubakar face. T...
